description: Metals & Miners screen - scores gold/silver/copper/uranium/lithium miners as leveraged calls on their metal vs proxy-ETF trend regimes, gated on balance-sheet survivability, with metal-anchored price targets. Output screener/metals-miners.json.

eventbridge_scheduler.description: Metals & Miners screen - daily 14:10 UTC via Amazon EventBridge Scheduler. The classic EventBridge 300-rule pool is saturated; Scheduler is the go-forward scheduling path.
